title: lobelia oligophylla
intro: Lobelia oligophylla, also known as small-leaf lobelia, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Campanulaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, as well as its ability to stimulate the nervous system. Lobelia oligophylla has been found to have various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma, as well as providing relief from menstrual cramps and other pain-related conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it due to its potential toxicity.
